costs.byProjectDesc: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.

costs.noCostEventsInPeriod: No cost events in this period.

scheduleEditor.cronHelp: Five fields: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week

executionWorkspaceClose.archiveDescription: Archive <bold>{{name}}</bold> and clean up any owned workspace artifacts. Paperclip keeps the workspace record and issue history, but removes it from active workspace views.
executionWorkspaceClose.checking: Checking whether this workspace is safe to close...
executionWorkspaceClose.failedToInspect: Failed to inspect workspace close readiness.
executionWorkspaceClose.sharedWorkspaceNote: This is a shared workspace session. Archiving it removes this session record but keeps the underlying project workspace.
executionWorkspaceClose.ownCheckoutNote: This execution workspace has its own checkout path and can be archived independently.
executionWorkspaceClose.primaryWorkspaceNote: This execution workspace currently points at the project's primary workspace path.
executionWorkspaceClose.disposableNote: This workspace is disposable and can be archived.
executionWorkspaceClose.cleanupRetryNote: Cleanup previously failed on this workspace. Retrying close will rerun the cleanup flow and update the workspace status if it succeeds.

outputFeedback.feedbackSharingDescription: Choose whether voted AI outputs can be shared with Paperclip Labs. This answer becomes the default for future thumbs up and thumbs down votes.
outputFeedback.voteSavedLocally: This vote is always saved locally.
outputFeedback.alwaysAllowInstruction: Choose Always allow to share this vote and future voted AI outputs. Choose Don't allow to keep this vote and future votes local.
outputFeedback.changeInSettings: You can change this later in Instance Settings > General.

financeKind.title: Financial event mix
financeKind.description: Account-level charges grouped by event kind.
financeKind.noEvents: No finance events in this period.

financeTimeline.title: Recent financial events
financeTimeline.description: Top-ups, fees, credits, commitments, and other non-request charges.
financeTimeline.noEvents: No financial events in this period.

pathInstructions.title: How to get a full path
pathInstructions.description: Paste the absolute path (e.g. /Users/you/project) into the input field.
pathInstructions.macStep1: Open Finder and navigate to the folder.
pathInstructions.macStep3: Hold the Option (⌥) key — "Copy" changes to "Copy as Pathname".
pathInstructions.macStep4: Click "Copy as Pathname", then paste here.
pathInstructions.macTip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, and press Enter. Then type pwd to see the full path.
pathInstructions.windowsStep1: Open File Explorer and navigate to the folder.
pathInstructions.windowsStep2: Click in the address bar at the top — the full path will appear.
pathInstructions.windowsStep3: Copy the path, then paste here.
pathInstructions.windowsTip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select "Copy as path".
pathInstructions.linuxStep1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
pathInstructions.linuxStep2: Run pwd to print the full path.
pathInstructions.linuxStep3: Copy the output and paste here.
pathInstructions.linuxTip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.

accountingModel.title: Accounting model
accountingModel.description: Paperclip now separates request-level inference usage from account-level finance events. That keeps provider reporting honest when the biller is OpenRouter, Cloudflare, Bedrock, or another intermediary.
accountingModel.inferenceLedgerDesc: Request-scoped usage and billed runs from cost_events.
accountingModel.financeLedgerDesc: Account-level charges that are not one prompt-response pair.
accountingModel.liveQuotasDesc: Provider or biller windows that can stop traffic in real time.

agentConfig.promptTemplateWarning: Prompt template is replayed on every heartbeat. Keep it compact and dynamic to avoid recurring token cost and cache churn.
agentConfig.promptTemplateCreateWarning: Prompt template is replayed on every heartbeat. Prefer small task framing and variables like {{ context.* }} or {{ run.* }}; avoid repeating stable instructions here.
agentConfig.bootstrapLegacyWarning: Bootstrap prompt is legacy and will be removed in a future release. Consider moving this content into the agent's prompt template or instructions file instead.
agentConfig.codexMinimalWarning: Codex may reject `minimal` thinking when search is enabled.
agentConfig.capabilitiesPlaceholder: Describe what this agent can do...
agentConfig.promptTemplatePlaceholder: You are agent {{ agent.name }}. Your role is {{ agent.role }}...
agentConfig.bootstrapPlaceholder: Optional initial setup prompt for the first run
agentConfig.envAutoInjected: PAPERCLIP_* variables are injected automatically at runtime.
agentConfig.noModelDetectedHint: No model detected yet. Enter a provider/model manually.

issueDocuments.deleteConfirm: Delete this document? This cannot be undone.
issueDocuments.documentKeyError: Use lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _, and start with a letter or number.
issueDocuments.documentKeyRequired: Document key and body are required
issueDocuments.documentKeyInvalid: Document key must start with a letter or number and use only lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _.
issueDocuments.historicalPreviewNote: This is a historical preview. Restoring it creates a new latest revision and keeps history append-only.
issueDocuments.outOfDateMessage: This document changed while you were editing. Your local draft is preserved and autosave is paused.
issueDocuments.documentChangedRemotely: Document changed remotely and the latest version could not be loaded
issueDocuments.saveOrCancelBeforeViewing: Save or cancel your local changes before viewing an older revision.

projectProperties.archiveDescription: Archive this project to hide it from the sidebar and project selectors.
projectProperties.unarchiveDescription: Unarchive this project to restore it in the sidebar and project selectors.
projectProperties.codebaseHelp: Repo identifies the source of truth. Local folder is the default place agents write code.
projectProperties.legacyWorkspaceNote: Additional legacy workspace records exist on this project. Paperclip is using the primary workspace as the codebase view.
projectProperties.localFolderAbsoluteError: Local folder must be a full absolute path.
projectProperties.repoUrlError: Repo must use a valid GitHub or GitHub Enterprise repo URL.
projectProperties.executionWorkspacesHelp: Project-owned defaults for isolated issue checkouts and execution workspace behavior.
projectProperties.enableIsolatedCheckoutsDesc: Let issues choose between the project's primary checkout and an isolated execution workspace.
projectProperties.newIssuesDefaultIsolated: New issues default to isolated checkout
projectProperties.newIssuesDefaultIsolatedDesc: If disabled, new issues stay on the project's primary checkout unless someone opts in.
projectProperties.provisionNote: Provision runs inside the derived worktree before agent execution. Teardown is stored here for future cleanup flows.

issueWorkspace.freshIsolatedWillBeCreated: A fresh isolated workspace will be created when this issue runs.
issueWorkspace.willReuseExisting: This issue will reuse an existing workspace when it runs.
issueWorkspace.willUseProjectDefault: This issue will use the project default workspace configuration when it runs.

configPrimitives.specifyPathDesc: Browser security blocks apps from reading full local paths via a file picker. Copy the absolute path and paste it into the input.
configPrimitives.macosStep4: Paste the result into the path input.
configPrimitives.windowsStep1: Find the folder in File Explorer.
configPrimitives.windowsStep4: Paste the result into the path input.
configPrimitives.terminalStep3: Copy the output and paste it into the path input.

jsonSchemaForm.secretStored: This secret is stored securely via the Paperclip secret provider.

reportsPicker.missingManager: Saved manager is missing from this company. Choose a new manager or clear.

instanceGeneral.title: General
instanceGeneral.description: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
instanceGeneral.censorUsernameDesc: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
instanceGeneral.keyboardShortcutsDesc: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
instanceGeneral.aiFeedbackDesc: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
instanceGeneral.noDefault: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
instanceGeneral.dontAllowDesc: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
instanceGeneral.signOutDesc: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

instanceExperimental.title: Experimental
instanceExperimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
instanceExperimental.isolatedWorkspacesDesc: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
instanceExperimental.autoRestartDesc: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.

instanceHeartbeats.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
instanceHeartbeats.description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
instanceHeartbeats.disableAllConfirm: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled {{noun}}?
instanceHeartbeats.noMatch: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

adapterManager.title: Adapters
adapterManager.installExternalDesc: Add an adapter from npm or a local path. The adapter package must export createServerAdapter().
adapterManager.externalAlphaDesc: The adapter plugin system is under active development. APIs and storage format may change. Use the power icon to hide adapters from agent menus without removing them.
adapterManager.noExternalDesc: Install an adapter package to extend model support.
adapterManager.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove the {{type}} adapter? It will be unregistered and removed from the adapter store. npm packages will be cleaned up from disk. This action cannot be undone.
adapterManager.reinstallDesc: This will pull the latest version of {{name}} from npm and hot-swap the running adapter module. Existing agents will use the new version on their next run.
